{{CargoClone
|name=Stalwart Zhao Yun
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=166
|gene1={race} HP +500
|gene2={race} FTH +50
|gene3=Water DMG +30
|gene4=Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +6
|gene5=Dragon Minion Skin HP +30%
|gene6=Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +10
|gene7=Dragon Minion Skin HP +50%
|}}
